headline: Duke Energy Florida implements third rate reduction to lower residential customer bills by approximately 25% in 2026
summary: Duke Energy Florida will implement its third rate reduction of 2026 from June through September, lowering residential customer bills by approximately $50, or 25%, for every 1,000 kilowatt-hours (kWh) of energy used when compared to January.

headline: DTE Energy Advances Growth Through Renewables and Data Centers
summary: DTE expands renewable, storage and grid infrastructure, while rising data center demand boosts long-term growth opportunities.
